title: Petal
description: Vanilla-like Flowers, decorations and Farming across all dimensions.
body:
# Petal (Alpha)

![Cherry grove](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/93d2bfca1a0e472c02a94496fae6afadcab0b226.jpeg)

Petal is a vanilla-like mod that aims to add features to enhance the vanilla gameplay while adding more things to do and decorate in the different dimentions.

## 🍂 Whats in the current version?
Petal is currently in alpha, if you want to see where development goes and test the features this mod adds, you can download and play it using Fabric.

Features in the in current version (0.0.6-alpha) are:
- An alternative to farmland (Muddy farmland & Nether Farmland)
- High-risk high-reward food (Fugu)
- Turnips (+ Huge turnips and Turnip Greens), Lava Fruit & Magma Berries!
- Nether vegitation (Dead Root, Lava Root & Magma Bloom)
- Water Lily and Water Lily pads in the swamps

## 🐛 How to play?
Petal is only available on [Fabric](https://fabricmc.net/), playing the mod requires the [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api). Put both `.jar` files in your `mods` folder and enjoy!
